comment: ; Stage-1 edge cases: structure-free forms that stress the fast-path
; byte decoder and its hand-off to the per-line grammar. Every line is
; either claimed by the decoder or must reject to pest transparently.
; flood shapes, block numbers, blank and N-only lines
; arcs: I/J/K/CR interpolation parameters are per-block, never sticky
; word operators must not split into assignment + call
; expressions and functions reject to pest, mixed with claimed lines
; deferred IC() and paren product words (computed multipliers)
; declarations and frames take the grammar; TRANS is sticky, bare TRANS resets
; bare parameterless subprogram calls; lowercase axis words are axis words
; labels, backward jump with a loop counter (single-line IF is not a block)
; conditional jump to a label that is never taken
; duplicate block numbers with a directional jump
